db:link.xlink:title: Porting Shadertoy effects to Qt Quick Effect Maker

db:abstract.db:para: Demonstrates how to use an effect created with the Qt Quick Effect Maker (QQEM).

db:article.db:programlisting:
TEMPLATE = app
QT += quick qml SOURCES += main.cpp RESOURCES += \ qml.qrc
target.path = $$[QT_INSTALL_EXAMPLES]/quickeffectmaker/wiggly INSTALLS += target
